name: TestGetWaitEventKLineByte
title: TestGetWaitEventKLineByte
description: If a byte is the last event that triggers a wait instruction, the content can be called up with the first function.
The second function allows to call the content and the end of byte time stamp.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
